description: Armada faction unit database for game simulation

air.description: Aircraft units including fighters, bombers, transports, and seaplanes

bot.description: Ground-based bipedal units including infantry, assault bots, and construction bots

building.description: Stationary structures for resource production, storage, and radar

defense.description: Defensive structures including turrets, walls, mines, and anti-air

hover.description: Hovercraft units that can traverse land and water

sea.description: Naval units including ships, submarines, and support vessels

vehicle.description: Ground vehicles including tanks, artillery, and support vehicles
